race.comment: WATT ON EARTH (4) was an impressive maiden winner last time out, scoring by 2.25 lengths over 1200m at Horsham. Winning rider Cian Macredmond stays aboard and he is a great chance to go back-to-back, especially after drawing the inside. KING ALLA (10) has a moderate winning strike-rate but performed well last time at Horsham, finishing third and only a long neck from the winner at the end of 1400m. Nicely placed to play a big role so long as he has a bit of luck from the draw. SUGAR AND SWEET (7) has been beaten similar margins in all four runs this time, most which have been better races than this, so he's only got to hold his form. TRIPLE OH (12) showed good early dash before weakening to be beaten 12 lengths into sixth over 2000m at Warracknabeal last time out. Blinkers go on today and he looks a top chance. PIANTA (16) deserves a change of luck after four seconds in a row in similar races to this and draws to get his chance.
